'''Muttani''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kalidorn]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. The Muttani had a sickly appearance and peculiar body odor. Their bodies were generally hairless, and their mouths were filled with sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]].

Perhaps the most infamous of all Muttani was [[Meeko Ghintee]]. He was captured and sent to [[Desolation Alley]], one of the most secure [[Prison/Legends|prisons]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], but actually managed to escape. He was later recaptured by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] and sent back to [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]].
